content.empathy_text: If that feels familiar, you’re not alone. Use this Contact page as a starting point—we’ll listen first, then propose an AI-first solution tailored to your stage, budget, and vision.

sections.title: Who You’re Reaching Out To
sections.subtitle: DOTR – Dhinoja OmniTech Resolutions

content.story: DOTR is an AI-first digital solutions company built to remove friction between ideas and execution. When you contact us, you’re speaking with a team that understands design, engineering, automation, and growth as one connected system.
content.mission: To help ambitious teams ship AI-powered, scalable digital experiences without juggling multiple vendors or outdated systems.
content.vision: To be the partner you call when you’re ready to treat your website and platforms like a living business engine—not a static brochure.

sections.title: Contact & Engagement FAQs
sections.subtitle: Answers to common questions before you reach out.

items.question: What happens after I submit the Contact form?
items.answer: You’ll receive an acknowledgment, and our team (with AI assistance) will review your details. We typically respond within 24 hours with either clarifying questions, a proposed call time, or an initial outline of next steps.

items.question: Is the first consultation free?
items.answer: Yes. The initial discovery conversation is focused on understanding your goals, challenges, and constraints. From there, we’ll suggest engagement options that match your stage and budget.

items.question: What kind of information should I include in my message?
items.answer: Share your current situation, target outcomes, timelines, and any existing assets (website, product, brand, etc.). The more context you provide, the more tailored and useful our response will be.

items.question: Can we start small and scale later?
items.answer: Absolutely. Many clients begin with a focused scope (e.g., a website, funnel, or AI automation pilot) and expand once we’ve proven value and established trust.

items.question: Do you work with teams in different time zones?
items.answer: Yes. We’re used to working with global teams and can align communication and delivery patterns with your time zone and working style.

items.question: Do you only work on AI-heavy projects?
items.answer: No. While we are AI-first, we’re equally comfortable with foundational projects like brand, website, or platform builds—and we’ll suggest where AI adds the most leverage.

items.question: Is everything we discuss confidential?
items.answer: Yes. We treat your information with care and can sign an NDA if required before sharing sensitive details.

items.question: How soon can we start after the first call?
items.answer: Start times vary by scope and complexity, but many projects kick off within 1–2 weeks after alignment on scope and terms.

content.headline: Share Your Challenge. We’ll Bring the AI-First Plan.
content.description: You don’t need a perfect brief—just a clear intent to improve. Tell us where you are now and where you’d like to go.

content.pitch: You share your goals and constraints. We bring AI-first thinking, end-to-end capabilities, and a clear plan to move from idea to execution.
content.tagline: One message today can unlock your next stage of growth.
content.author: DOTR

sections.title: The Cost of Not Reaching Out
sections.subtitle: Then what happens when you do.

content.problem: Every month you delay modernizing your stack, brand, or funnels, you lose opportunities, efficiency, and signal to your market.
content.agitation: Your team stays busy with manual work. Your prospects struggle through outdated flows. Competitors who invest now move faster while you stay in reactive mode.
content.solution: A simple conversation with DOTR can unlock a phased, AI-first plan that respects your constraints while moving you forward. One message today can prevent months of compounding technical and operational debt.
